ogTitle: Devlins Pound vs Devon Park: Climate Safety

heading: Devlins Pound vs Devon Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Devlins Pound, South Australia and Devon Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Devon Park has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Devlins Pound (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Devlins Pound or Devon Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Devlins Pound has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Devon Park scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Devlins Pound scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Devon Park scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Devlins Pound or Devon Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Devon Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
